zh.lifeSummary: 當Hannah Haynes於1637年出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼諾薩普頓時，她的父親Edmund Haynes17歲，母親Hannah Lambe15歲。她於1660年12月30日與Joseph Root在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼諾薩普頓結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1691年1月28日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼哈普爾諾薩普頓享年54歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Hannah Haynes于1637年出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼諾薩普頓时，她的父亲Edmund Haynes17岁，母亲Hannah Lambe15岁。她于1660年12月30日与Joseph Root在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼諾薩普頓结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1691年1月28日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼哈普爾諾薩普頓享年54岁。

nameMeanings.name: Haynes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: variant of Hayne , with genitival or post-medieval excrescent -s; see Hain . Compare Hains .
English: habitational name from Haynes (Bedfordshire), which may derive from Old English hagenas, plural form of hagen ‘enclosure’.

English: in English counties bordering Wales, perhaps from the Welsh personal name Einws (a pet form of Welsh Einion) with a prosthetic H-; see also Enos . While this is linguistically possible there is no evidence yet to show that it was the origin of the surname.

variants.name: Hains
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Monique.
English (southwestern): variant of   Haynes   and, in North America, (also) an altered form of this. Compare   Hance   2 and   Hince   2.

History: Jonathan (Joseph) Haynes, born in MA, was captured in New England by the French at age twelve and taken to QC, Canada, where he married Marie Pauzé in 1712. His descendants bear various altered forms of the surname Haynes, such as Hains, Hance, and Hince.

variants.name: Hayne
meanings: History: Isaac Hayne (1745–81) was an American revolutionary militia officer, executed by the British for breaking parole. He owned an ironworks and was manufacturing ammunition for the American forces when he was caught. His grandfather had emigrated from England to SC c. 1700.

variants.name: Aynes
meanings: English: variant of Haynes with loss of initial H-. This surname is very rare in Britain.

variants.name: Haines
meanings: English (southern) and Irish (Cork): variant of   Haynes  .

variants.name: Hain
meanings: English: topographic name from Middle English heghen, a weak plural of hay, from Old English (ge)hæg ‘enclosure’, denoting someone who lived at a farm, or a habitational name from any of various places called with this word. See also Haynes .

English: from the Middle English personal name Hain, Heyne. Like Deyn this may be a rhyming pet form of Reynald (see Reginald ) or other names of Norman origin beginning with Rein- such as Reyner and Rainbert. Alternatively, the name may be a variant of Hagan .

English: nickname for a wretched individual, from Middle English hain(e), heyne, hayn ‘wretch, niggard’. In some cases however, it is possible that this name derives from a spelling (not a pronunciation) of hi(g)ne ‘servant’ (see Hine ), with the inverted spelling -ey- for i.

nameMeanings.name: Hannah
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Biblical name, borne by the mother of the prophet Samuel (1 Samuel 1:2), Hebrew Hanna. It is derived from a Hebrew word meaning ‘He (i.e. God) has favoured me (i.e. with a child)’. See also Anne . This form of the name was taken up as a given name by the Puritans in the 16th and 17th centuries and remained popular until the late 19th century. Thereafter it fell somewhat from favour but has enjoyed a massive revival since the 1990s.

variants.name: Hanna
meanings: Either the biblical name ( see Hannah ) or a short form of Johanna .

variants.name: Hana
meanings: Originally a feminine form of John , from the Old French form Je(h)anne. Since the 17th century it has proved the most popular of the feminine forms of John, ahead of Joan and Jean . It now also commonly occurs as the second element in combinations such as Sarah-Jane. In Britain it is still one of the most frequent of all girls' names. It is not a royal name, but was borne by the tragic Lady Jane Grey ( 1537–54 ), who was unwillingly proclaimed queen in 1553 , deposed nine days later, and executed the following year. Seventy years earlier, the name had come into prominence as that of Jane Shore , mistress of King Edward IV and subsequently of Thomas Grey , 1st Marquess of Dorset, Lady Jane's grandfather. Jane Shore's tribulations in 1483 at the hands of Richard III , Edward's brother and successor, became the subject of popular ballads and plays, which may well have increased the currency of the name in the 16th century. A 19th-century influence was its use as the name of the central character in Charlotte Brontë's novel Jane Eyre ( 1847 ). From 1932 to 1959 it was used as the name of a cheerful and scantily clad beauty whose adventures were chronicled in a strip cartoon in the Daily Mirror. It is also borne by the American film stars Jane Russell ( 1921–2011 ) and Jane Fonda ( b. 1937 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Hannah Haynes was born in 1637, in Northampton, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, her father, Edmund Haynes, was 17 and her mother, Hannah Lambe, was 15. She married Joseph Root on 30 December 1660, in Northampton, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 2 daughters. She died on 28 January 1691, in Northampton, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 54.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Hannah Haynes est née en 1637, à Northampton, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, son père, Edmund Haynes, avait 17 ans et sa mère, Hannah Lambe, avait 15 ans. Elle a épousé Joseph Root le 30 décembre 1660, à Northampton, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 28 janvier 1691, à Northampton, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 54 ans.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Hannah Haynes è nata il nel 1637 nel Northampton, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, sua padre, Edmund Haynes, aveva 17 anni e sua madre, Hannah Lambe, aveva 15 anni. Lei sposato Joseph Root il 30 dicembre 1660, nel Northampton, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 28 gennaio 1691, nel Northampton, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, all'età di 54 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Hannah Haynesが1637年にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーノーサンプトンで生まれた時，父Edmund Haynesは17歳，母Hannah Lambeは15歳であった。1660年12月30日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーノーサンプトンでJoseph Rootと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1691年1月28日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーハンプシュアイアノーサンプトンで54歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Hannah Haynes(이)가 1637년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 노르섬프턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Edmund Haynes(은)는 17세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Hannah Lambe(은)는 15세였다. 그녀는 1660년 12월 30일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 노르섬프턴에서 Joseph Root(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1691년 1월 28일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 함프실르 노르섬프턴에서 54세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Hannah Haynes nasceu em 1637, em Northampton, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, seu pai, Edmund Haynes, tinha 17 anos e sua mãe, Hannah Lambe, tinha 15 anos. Ela casou-se com Joseph Root em 30 de dezembro de 1660, em Northampton, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 28 de janeiro de 1691, em Northampton, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, com 54 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Hannah Haynes родилась в 1637 г. в местности нортамптон, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика, её отцу по имени Edmund Haynes было 17 лет, а матери, которую звали Hannah Lambe, 15. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Joseph Root 30 декабря 1660 г. в местности нортамптон, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 2 дочери. Она умерла 28 января 1691 г. в местности нортамптон, хампшир, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 54 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Hannah Haynes nació en 1637, en Northampton, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, su papá, Edmund Haynes, tenía 17 años y su mamá, Hannah Lambe, tenía 15 años. Se casó con Joseph Root el 30 de diciembre de 1660, en Northampton, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 28 de enero de 1691, en Northampton, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, a la edad de 54 años.
